task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the meeting request text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of the file at ~/Documents/meeting_request.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct subject for the meeting in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo meeting creation or edit form shows 'Systems Infrastructure Check' in the Subject or Meeting Title field.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct location and duration for the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo meeting form shows 'Server Room' in the Location field and a duration of 1.5 hours (or start and end times that are exactly 90 minutes apart).

task_completion.description: The agent added the correct attendees to the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Attendees field in the Odoo meeting form contains the contacts 'Luis Fernandez' and 'David Chen'.

task_completion.description: The meeting is successfully saved and appears on the Odoo Calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar grid view displays a meeting block titled 'Systems Infrastructure Check' scheduled on the correct calculated date and time.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible showing the Odoo interface, indicating genuine GUI interaction rather than API calls.

integrity.description: The agent actually read the text file instead of using pre-programmed knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the contents of meeting_request.txt being accessed via terminal (e.g., cat command) or a text editor.

integrity.description: The meeting was genuinely created in the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The meeting appears as a standard calendar block in the Odoo Calendar UI, not as text in a document or a mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting request file is located at `/home/ga/Documents/meeting_request.txt`. The meeting must be scheduled in Odoo Calendar with the following details: Subject: 'Systems Infrastructure Check', Location: 'Server Room', Duration: 90 minutes (1.5 hours), Attendees: 'Luis Fernandez' and 'David Chen'. The exact date and time must match the relative date specified in the text file.
